query:
-- Campos fiscales en tpv_sales
ALTER TABLE tpv_sales
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS taxBase       DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0    COMMENT 'Base imponible total (IVA normal)',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS taxAmount     DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0    COMMENT 'Cuota IVA total',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS taxRate       DECIMAL(5,2)  DEFAULT 21   COMMENT 'Tipo IVA aplicado (%)',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reavMargin    DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0    COMMENT 'Margen REAV total',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reavCost      DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0    COMMENT 'Coste proveedor REAV total',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reavTax       DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0    COMMENT 'Impuesto sobre margen REAV',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fiscalSummary VARCHAR(20)   DEFAULT 'mixed' COMMENT 'iva_only|reav_only|mixed',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS saleChannel   VARCHAR(20)   DEFAULT 'tpv'   COMMENT 'Canal de venta: tpv|online|crm|admin',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sellerUserId  INT           DEFAULT NULL  COMMENT 'ID del vendedor (usuario)',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sellerName    VARCHAR(200)  DEFAULT NULL  COMMENT 'Nombre del vendedor',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS operativeCenter VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Estación / Centro operativo';

-- Campos fiscales en tpv_sale_items
ALTER TABLE tpv_sale_items
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fiscalRegime  ENUM('reav','general_21','mixed') DEFAULT 'general_21' COMMENT 'Régimen fiscal del producto',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS taxBase       DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0    COMMENT 'Base imponible línea',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS taxAmount     DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0    COMMENT 'Cuota IVA línea',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS taxRate       DECIMAL(5,2)  DEFAULT 21   COMMENT 'Tipo IVA (%)',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reavCost      DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0    COMMENT 'Coste proveedor REAV',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reavMargin    DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0    COMMENT 'Margen REAV',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reavTax       DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0    COMMENT 'Impuesto sobre margen REAV';

-- Ampliar tabla transactions con campos del libro maestro
ALTER TABLE transactions
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS clientName    VARCHAR(200)  DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS clientEmail   VARCHAR(200)  DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS clientPhone   VARCHAR(50)   DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS productName   VARCHAR(300)  DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS operativeCenter VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Estación / Centro operativo',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sellerUserId  INT           DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sellerName    VARCHAR(200)  DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS saleChannel   ENUM('tpv','online','crm','admin','delegado') DEFAULT 'admin',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS taxBase       DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS taxAmount     DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reavMargin    DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fiscalRegime  ENUM('reav','general_21','mixed') DEFAULT 'general_21',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tpvSaleId     INT           DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reservationId INT           DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceNumber VARCHAR(32)   DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reservationRef VARCHAR(32)  DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS operationStatus ENUM('confirmada','anulada','reembolsada') DEFAULT 'confirmada';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute
